faqs.question: How do I choose the right Rivotek solution for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Rivotek solution depends on your application requirements: (1) For smart cockpit systems - choose Automotive Intelligent Solution with RV1000 automotive grade platform; (2) For AI edge devices - choose AI Hardware Solution with optimized computing platforms; (3) For smart manufacturing - choose Industrial IoT Solution with industrial-grade platforms; (4) For robotics applications - choose Embodied Intelligence Solution with advanced perception capabilities. Consider factors like processing requirements, AI performance needs, environmental conditions, and cost constraints. Contact LiTong FAE for personalized recommendations.
faqs.decisionGuide: Match solution to application requirements. Contact FAE for guidance.

faqs.question: What support does LiTong provide for Rivotek solutions?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive support for Rivotek solutions: (1) Technical consultation - helping select the right components for your application; (2) Application engineering - supporting hardware design, software integration, and system optimization; (3) Reference designs - providing proven design examples and evaluation platforms; (4) Quality support - handling RMA processes and quality issues; (5) Design-in support - providing technical documentation and application notes; (6) Long-term supply - ensuring stable supply for production programs. Our FAE team has expertise in embedded systems, AI applications, and automotive electronics.
faqs.decisionGuide: LiTong provides end-to-end support from design to production for Rivotek solutions.

faqs.question: Can Rivotek provide custom solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rivotek offers custom solutions for specific application requirements: (1) Custom board designs - tailored hardware for specific form factors; (2) Software customization - customized AIOS and application software; (3) AI model optimization - optimized models for specific use cases; (4) Integration services - system integration and validation support; (5) Long-term supply - guaranteed availability for production programs. Custom solutions require minimum order quantities and development lead times. Contact LiTong to discuss your specific requirements and feasibility.
faqs.decisionGuide: Custom solutions available for volume applications. Contact LiTong to discuss requirements.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Rivotek solutions?
faqs.answer: Rivotek solution lead times vary by complexity: (1) Standard platforms - 6-8 weeks for common configurations; (2) Custom hardware - 10-14 weeks including design and prototyping; (3) Software customization - 4-8 weeks depending on scope; (4) Volume production - 8-12 weeks for large orders. LiTong maintains strategic inventory for high-demand Rivotek products. For critical projects, we recommend forecasting and buffer stock arrangements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Standard solutions 6-8 weeks, custom solutions 10-14 weeks. Contact sales for specific lead times.

faqs.question: Does Rivotek offer evaluation kits for solution development?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rivotek offers evaluation kits for solution development: (1) Development boards - complete hardware platform with all interfaces; (2) Software SDK - comprehensive software development kit; (3) Reference designs - proven hardware and software examples; (4) Technical documentation - detailed datasheets and application notes; (5) Sample code - example applications and drivers. Evaluation kits are available for qualified customers. Contact LiTong sales to request evaluation kits for your project.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluation kits available for qualified projects. Contact LiTong sales to request development kits.

solutions.name: Automotive Intelligent Solution
solutions.title: Rivotek Automotive Intelligent Solution
solutions.subtitle: Complete smart cockpit and intelligent driving solution for next-generation vehicles
solutions.description: Comprehensive automotive solution featuring Rivotek intelligent computing platforms optimized for smart cockpit and intelligent driving applications.
solutions.longDescription:
The Automotive Intelligent Solution from rivotek represents a comprehensive approach to addressing modern challenges in Industrial. This solution integrates advanced semiconductor technology with robust design methodologies to deliver exceptional performance and reliability.

At the core of this solution is a carefully selected portfolio of rivotek components optimized for the target application. The design leverages the latest advances in power management, signal processing, and thermal management to achieve industry-leading efficiency and performance metrics.

Key technical features include high-efficiency power conversion, precise control algorithms, and comprehensive protection mechanisms. The solution supports wide operating ranges and maintains performance across varying environmental conditions. Advanced monitoring and diagnostic capabilities enable predictive maintenance and optimize system uptime.

Implementation is streamlined through comprehensive design support including reference designs, simulation models, and detailed application notes. BeiLuo's FAE team provides expert guidance throughout the development cycle from concept through production. Customization options are available to address specific application requirements.

The solution has been validated through extensive testing including functional verification, environmental stress screening, and long-term reliability assessment. Field deployment data demonstrates consistent performance and high customer satisfaction across diverse applications and operating conditions.

faqs.question: What automotive certifications does the solution have?
faqs.answer: The Automotive Intelligent Solution has comprehensive certifications: (1) AEC-Q100 Grade 2 - qualified for automotive temperature range -40°C to +105°C; (2) ISO 26262 ASIL-B - functional safety certification for safety-critical systems; (3) IATF 16949 - quality management system for automotive; (4) EMC compliance - meets automotive electromagnetic compatibility requirements. These certifications ensure the solution meets the stringent requirements of automotive applications for quality, reliability, and safety.

faqs.question: How many displays can the solution support?
faqs.answer: The solution supports up to three 4K displays simultaneously: (1) Instrument cluster - high-resolution display for vehicle information; (2) Center infotainment - main touchscreen for navigation and entertainment; (3) Rear entertainment - optional rear seat displays. The RV1000 platform provides independent display controllers for each output, enabling different content on each screen. Display interfaces include MIPI DSI, LVDS, and HDMI options for flexibility in display selection.

faeInsights.title: Senior FAE - Automotive Electronics
faeInsights.summary: Automotive system design requires careful attention to safety, reliability, and performance.
faeInsights.content: In my experience supporting automotive projects, the Rivotek Automotive Solution provides an excellent balance of performance and cost for smart cockpit applications. The AEC-Q100 qualification and ISO 26262 support are essential for automotive deployment. I particularly appreciate the comprehensive software stack which accelerates development. Key considerations include thermal management for automotive environments, EMC design for noise immunity, and functional safety implementation. The multi-display support enables modern cockpit architectures. Always plan for automotive qualification early in the project timeline.
faeInsights.insight: Early engagement with FAE and planning for automotive qualification can prevent schedule delays.
faeInsights.logic: Automotive qualification processes take time. Early planning ensures smooth production approval.
keyTakeaways: Use AEC-Q100 qualified components for automotive
Consider thermal design for automotive environment
bestPractices: Engage FAE early for automotive projects

faqs.question: What AI models are supported?
faqs.answer: The solution supports common AI models: (1) Face detection and recognition - real-time face analysis; (2) Object detection - YOLO, SSD architectures; (3) Object classification - support for 1000+ object classes; (4) Behavior analysis - people counting, dwell time analysis; (5) License plate recognition - OCR for vehicle access. Models can be deployed using TensorFlow Lite or ONNX Runtime. The Rivotek AI SDK provides tools for model optimization and quantization.

faqs.question: How does on-device AI compare to cloud AI?
faqs.answer: On-device AI offers several advantages: (1) Privacy - data processed locally without cloud transmission; (2) Latency - real-time response without network delay; (3) Reliability - works without internet connection; (4) Cost - no ongoing cloud service fees; (5) Bandwidth - reduced network traffic. However, on-device AI has limitations in model complexity compared to cloud. The solution is ideal for applications requiring real-time response and privacy protection.

faeInsights.title: Principal FAE - AI Applications
faeInsights.summary: Edge AI design requires balancing performance, power, and cost for optimal deployment.
faeInsights.content: Edge AI applications require careful optimization of AI models for the target hardware. In my experience, the Rivotek platforms provide excellent performance for common computer vision tasks. Model optimization is critical - quantization and pruning can achieve 2-4x speedup with minimal accuracy loss. Key considerations include camera selection for optimal image quality, lighting conditions for reliable recognition, and thermal design for continuous operation. The development tools make model deployment straightforward. Always benchmark your specific models on the target hardware.
faeInsights.insight: Model optimization is as important as hardware selection for edge AI performance.
faeInsights.logic: Optimized models run faster and consume less power, enabling better edge deployment.
keyTakeaways: Optimize AI models for target hardware

solutions.name: Smart Cockpit Solution
solutions.title: Rivotek Smart Cockpit Solution
solutions.subtitle: Integrated cockpit platform for next-generation vehicle interiors
solutions.description: Complete smart cockpit solution featuring multi-display support, AI-powered interaction, and automotive-grade reliability for modern vehicle interiors.
solutions.longDescription:
The Smart Cockpit Solution from Rivotek provides a comprehensive platform for modern vehicle interior electronics. This solution integrates high-performance computing, multi-display support, and AI-powered features to deliver a premium in-vehicle experience.

The solution supports multiple high-resolution displays including central infotainment, digital instrument cluster, and passenger entertainment screens. Advanced graphics capabilities enable smooth animations and rich visual content. The integrated NPU enables AI features such as driver monitoring, gesture control, and voice recognition.

Key features include seamless smartphone integration, navigation with real-time traffic, media streaming, and vehicle control interfaces. The solution supports over-the-air updates for continuous feature enhancement. Automotive-grade components ensure reliable operation in harsh vehicle environments.

Implementation is supported by comprehensive software including Android Automotive BSP, middleware, and reference applications. BeiLuo's automotive FAE team provides expert guidance on system design, thermal management, and EMC optimization. The solution meets automotive quality standards including AEC-Q100 and IATF 16949.

features.title: Multi-Display
features.description: Support for up to 4 independent displays

resources.title: Smart Cockpit Design Guide
resources.description: Comprehensive guide for cockpit system design

customerCases.challenge: Required premium cockpit with 3 displays and AI features for new EV model
customerCases.solution: Deployed RV1000 Auto-based cockpit with integrated DMS and voice control
customerCases.result: Launched on schedule with excellent user experience ratings

faqs.question: How many displays can the solution support?
faqs.answer: The Smart Cockpit Solution supports up to 4 independent displays simultaneously: (1) Central infotainment - main touchscreen for navigation and media; (2) Digital instrument cluster - driver information and warnings; (3) Passenger display - entertainment for front passenger; (4) Rear seat entertainment - screens for rear passengers. Each display can run independent content or share content across displays. The RV1000 Auto processor provides sufficient graphics performance for smooth operation of all displays.

faqs.question: What AI features are included?
faqs.answer: The solution includes several AI-powered features: (1) Driver Monitoring System (DMS) - detects driver drowsiness and distraction; (2) Gesture control - hand gestures for controlling infotainment; (3) Voice recognition - natural language commands for vehicle functions; (4) Face recognition - personalized settings for different drivers; (5) Occupant monitoring - detects passengers and their state. These features enhance safety and user experience while maintaining privacy through on-device processing.

faeInsights.title: Principal FAE - Automotive Systems
faeInsights.summary: Smart cockpit design requires balancing performance, safety, and user experience.
faeInsights.content: Smart cockpit systems are the centerpiece of modern vehicle interiors. From my experience with multiple OEM projects, successful cockpit design requires careful attention to: display integration for seamless user experience, thermal management in compact spaces, EMC design for noise-free operation, and functional safety for critical information. The Rivotek platform provides excellent performance for multi-display cockpits while meeting automotive quality standards. Early engagement with the FAE team helps avoid common pitfalls in automotive design.
faeInsights.insight: User experience is as important as technical performance in cockpit design.
faeInsights.logic: A well-designed cockpit enhances driver satisfaction and vehicle appeal.
